trade.summary: Significant bilateral trade driven by technology, pharmaceuticals, and defence. The Regno Unito exports machinery, financial services, and chemicals to Israele. Israele exports software, cybersecurity, medical devices, and diamonds to the Regno Unito. Israele-Regno Unito trade has grown strongly through the bilateral agreement replacing the EU-Israele trade pact post-Brexit.
disputes: Regno Unito arms sales suspension review post-Gaza

diplomatic.summary: The Regno Unito and Israele have historically close relations through security, intelligence, and historical ties (Balfour Declaration). The Gaza conflict has strained relations significantly. The Regno Unito suspended some arms export licences to Israele in 2024, and Regno Unito public opinion has become more critical. Both sides maintain close contact at official level but political relationships are under pressure.
recent_incidents: Regno Unito suspension of some arms licences to Israele (2024)
Regno Unito abstentions/votes at UN calling for Gaza ceasefire
Netanyahu ICC arrest warrant (Regno Unito bound by ICC obligations)
Regno Unito-Israele joint counter-terrorism cooperation ongoing

military.summary: Historically close intelligence and defence cooperation. The Regno Unito and Israele share signals intelligence and counterterrorism cooperation. Regno Unito arms sales to Israele were partially suspended in 2024 due to Gaza conflict concerns. Joint defence technology development continues in areas like cybersecurity and drone technology.
incidents: UK intelligence cooperation with Israel on Iran nuclear file

financial.summary: London is a major listing venue for Israelei tech companies. Regno Unito venture capital is active in Israelei tech startups. Israelei investors have significant Regno Unito real estate and financial holdings. Post-Gaza, some investors have become cautious but commercial ties remain robust.

energy.summary: Limited direct energy trade. Regno Unito interest in Eastern Mediterranean gas including potential Israelei exports. Some cooperation in clean energy technology.

scientific.summary: Strong scientific cooperation in life sciences, AI, cybersecurity, and materials. Israele-Regno Unito research and innovation bilateral programme active. Jewish community links facilitate researcher exchanges. Regno Unito universities have numerous Israelei academic staff and students.
